0 AND 14
1 AND 25
2 AND 36
3 AND 47
4 C 4n
5 C 5n
6 C 6n
7 C 7n

Applying to 00010000
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 AND 14 = AND(I 1,I 4) = AND(0,0) = 0
1 AND 25 = AND(I 2,I 5) = AND(0,0) = 0
2 AND 36 = AND(I 3,I 6) = AND(1,0) = 0
3 AND 47 = AND(I 4,I 7) = AND(0,0) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 C 6n = NOT(1) = 0
7 C 7n = NOT(1) = 0

\boxed{00000000}
